sections.title: Purpose
sections.body: The purpose of this website is to create a useful service for students and their parents to access tutoring services, connect with private tutors, and utilise educational resources.

sections.title: Agreement to the Terms
sections.body: This sets out the Terms and Conditions (“T’s & C’s”) of your enrolment with Tutor Victory (“Tutor Victory” or “We”). Please read through this thoroughly before using the services of Tutor Victory. By submitting the Registration Form and/or by conducting lessons with Tutor Victory will indicate that you have read through these terms and are in agreement with them. In doing so, you are also agreeing to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Fundamentally, by using, browsing and/or reading Tutor Victory contents and services, this signifies that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by the Terms. If you do not agree with the Terms, you must cease usage of Tutor Victory’s Services, immediately.

sections.title: Membership
sections.body: Tutor Victory reserves the right to refuse tutor or student registration, in the case of (but not limited to) inappropriate conduct and illegal use of material.

sections.title: Disclaimer 1
sections.body: Although the Tutor Victory team tries their very best to deliver student results, Tutor Victory makes no guarantee on likely results and the reliability of materials on the site, or used externally by tutors. Thus, we shall not be held legally responsible if the student fails to attain a certain result, especially considering that this is influenced by several factors such as work habits and individual effort.

sections.title: Disclaimer 2
sections.body: The term ‘qualified’ on the Tutor Victory website and advertisements indicates a past Year 12 graduate who has acquired the score for their respective subject or has subject expertise deemed suitable by Tutor Victory during the hiring process. ‘Qualified’ does not necessarily mean that they have acquired a teaching degree.

sections.title: Refunds
sections.body: Refunds for any lessons are at the discretion of Tutor Victory, and will be accordingly issued if the Student has notified any member of the team regarding what they believe may be errors. Notifications can be through text (sms), emails, or phone calls.

sections.title: Free Consultation
sections.body: Tutor Victory offers new students a “Free 15 minute consultation” to maximise the compatibility of the Student and assigned Tutor, and optimise student satisfaction. This is not a full lesson, but rather a strategy session over a phone call for the student to decide if the pairing is a good fit and the tutor to gauge a better understanding of the student’s requirements, and to plan for the first couple of lessons.

sections.title: Lesson Continuation
sections.body: Tutor Victory does not enforce strict lesson times or weekly sessions with parents or students, allowing clients to organise lessons on a flexible basis. However, in order to ensure consistent work for our tutors, maximise tutor availability and minimise waiting list times, Tutor Victory enforces a “Lesson Continuity Policy.” Tutor Victory expects students to have at least 1hr of tutoring per week throughout the school term to optimise their progress, but if lessons are to be skipped, it is expected that the student informs the tutor.

sections.title: Academic Honesty
sections.body: Tutor Victory values academic honesty and will thus, not directly help Students with formative assignments nor will participate in violating any of the academic policies outlined by the Student’s school/institution; this includes but is not limited to writing assignments for the Student and taking their exams for them.

sections.title: Revision of Documents and Materials
sections.body: Tutor Victory holds the right to revise these Terms of Service as well as any other documents and materials relevant to the business at our sole discretion – where the Student is bound by the then current version of the document. Thus, Tutor Victory encourages that the Student checks in regularly on what the rules and regulations are at Tutor Victory.

sections.title: Privacy
sections.body: We take your privacy seriously and any information provided through your use of Tutor Victory’s Services are subject to our Privacy Policy, which is available on the website.
